title: AI Stack Library Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.yaml found inside a .ai-library knowledge package (D-013).

name.description: Unique library identifier in kebab-case slug format (e.g. 'golang-best-practices').

author.description: Free-form author identifier (person, team, or node name).

description.description: Human-readable summary of the library contents.

profiles.description: Discovery profiles this volume supports. See D-014 for profile semantics.

language.description: Primary language of the content as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. 'en', 'de', 'pt-BR').

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this package version was created.

visibility.description: Access policy: who may discover and read this library. See D-035. private=owner only; shared=group/team auth required; public=any authenticated caller; licensed=requires license acceptance before content is served.

status.description: Administrative lifecycle state. See D-035. active=live, visibility applies; unvetted=pending admin review, not served to non-admins; prohibited=blocked, record preserved for audit.

$comment: Package layout and checksums.txt format — see D-013 in docs/meta_local/decisions.md

examples.name: golang-best-practices
examples.author: alice
examples.description: Curated Go programming best practices and patterns.
